title: eleocharis acicularis subsp. bonariensis
intro: Eleocharis acicularis subsp. bonariensis, also known as Argentine spikerush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of using Eleocharis acicularis subsp. bonariensis include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and improving digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
